description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with multiple interconnected rooms and open spaces, typical of a modern suburban residence. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large rectangular windows distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure includes a prominent garage section, visible from one side, and several entry points, suggesting multiple access routes. The roof is flat, contributing to a contemporary architectural style, and the window arrangement is mostly symmetrical with some larger panes in communal areas. The interior layout is open, with visible partitions for living, dining, and private spaces. The overall design emphasizes functionality, openness, and a clean, minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious, open layout. The exterior is white with symmetrical window placement and a prominent garage.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with large windows and the central living area, showing the open layout and multiple entry points.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the garage section and secondary entry, with fewer windows and a more private aspect.
description_view_2: The rear view displays additional large windows and the open communal spaces, with a clear view of the flat roof and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: This view shows the back and side of the house, including service areas and secondary rooms, with less window coverage and more solid wall sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, and minimal overhang, emphasizing clean lines and accessibility.
